introSection:
Atlantica SuperSplash is a Mack Rides water roller coaster located at Europa-Park in Rust, Baden Wuerttemberg, Germany. It opened on 19 March 2005. The ride's theme is based on Portuguese conquistadors.

There are also two other SuperSplash coasters with custom layouts, including Journey to Atlantis at SeaWorld San Antonio in San Antonio, Texas, which opened in 2007.
fullText:
Atlantica SuperSplash is a Mack Rides water roller coaster located at Europa-Park in Rust, Baden Wuerttemberg, Germany. It opened on 19 March 2005. The ride's theme is based on Portuguese conquistadors.

There are also two other SuperSplash coasters with custom layouts, including Journey to Atlantis at SeaWorld San Antonio in San Antonio, Texas, which opened in 2007.
